title: Corn Custard
ingredients: 4 cups frozen whole kernel corn, thawed and drained well
2 tablespoons chopped pimiento or roasted red pepper
instructions: Mix corn, butter, eggs, cornmeal, salt, pimiento, celery, sour cream, cheese, chilies, and cayenne pepper together in a large bowl.
Bake at 350 degrees for 50 minutes or until brown and set.
